title: Intha Siripinai Angu Paarthen Lyrics Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar
stanzas:
Intha Siripinai Angu Paarthen Lyrics Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar
#KarthikRaja #Hariharan

intha siripinai engu paarthen
minnal theriththadhu adhil paarthen
indha thudippinai engu paarthen
unnidathil mattumthaan paarthen.(2)

kaalai manjal veyil parthaen
poove undhan niram paarthaen
parkkum undhan vizhi paarthaen
kadhal endha niram paarthaen

paarvaikku oar paarvai
edhirp paarkiraen.
vaaraadha thookkatha
vazhi parkkiren

kasangiya thalaiyanai paarthu
ilamaiyin pasiyai paarthen
anigra udaigalum endrendum
sumaigal aagumo.

indha siripinai engu paarthaen
minnal therithadhu adhil paarthen
kalla sirippinai engu paarthen
andhiyinil konjamthaan paarthen

mazhayil vaanavillai paarthen
undhan vetkam adhu paarthaen
saaral sindhuvathai paarthen
undhan muththam adhil paarthen

thaen oorum poo paarthu
idhazh paarkiren
kannaadi paarthaal unai
paarkiren.

pulveli meedhinil thoongum
paniyinai thinamum paarthen
mozhiyinil sollida
vaarthaigal illaamal ponathe.

intha siripinai engu paarthen
minnal theriththadhu adhil paarthen
indha thudippinai engu paarthen
unnidathil mattumthaan paarthen.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Intha Siripinai Angu Paarthen?

The song beautifully captures themes of romance and longing, with soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics.

Who composed the music for Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar?

The music for the movie was composed by Karthik Raja.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by Hariharan and Vibha Sharma.

What is the release year of the movie Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar?

The movie was released in 1998.

What emotions does the song evoke?

The song evokes emotions of love, nostalgia, and a sense of longing.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Intha Siripinai Angu Paarthen from Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar is a romantic duet that beautifully expresses the emotions of love and longing. Sung by Hariharan and Vibha Sharma, the melody is soothing and captures the essence of a heartfelt connection. The lyrics, penned by Palani Bharathi, convey a sense of yearning and admiration. Karthik Raja's composition enhances the emotional depth, making it a memorable piece for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Intha Siripinai Angu Paarthen from the movie Naam Iruvar Namakku Iruvar. This beautiful duet by Hariharan and Vibha Sharma, composed by Karthik Raja, captures the essence of romance and longing. Let the soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics transport you to a world of love and nostalgia.
stanzaMeanings: I saw this smile somewhere, like a flash of lightning. I felt this heartbeat only with you.
I saw the morning's yellow sunlight, saw your color like a flower. I looked into your eyes and saw the color of love.
I am looking back at a glance. I am waiting for sleep that doesn't come.
I looked at the messy pillow and saw the hunger of youth. Will fancy clothes always be a burden?
I saw this smile somewhere, like a flash of lightning. I saw a mischievous smile briefly in the evening.
I saw a rainbow in the rain, saw your shyness. I saw the drizzle, and in it, your kiss.
I look at the honey-dripping flower, I see your lips. When I look in the mirror, I see you.
I see the dew sleeping on the grass every day. Words to express it are missing.
My love, I saw that love is happiness.
I saw this smile somewhere, like a flash of lightning. I felt this heartbeat only with you.
